use_cases: Security teams monitoring anomaly detection and suspicious activity across time periods
DevOps teams visualizing system health and performance anomalies in monitoring dashboards
Data analysts exploring time-series anomaly intensity patterns in analytics platforms
Fraud detection systems displaying suspicious transaction heatmaps over time windows
Network operations centers monitoring security event intensity across time ranges
ai_summary: An anomaly heatmap visualization component displaying intensity levels of suspicious signals across time windows. Features animated cells with cyan color intensity mapping, hover interactions with scale and glow effects, and a clean card layout for integration into monitoring and analytics dashboards.
